__comment__: Gemma HONEST line (2026-07-13, gemma-3). Gemma is the PRIMARY answerer (tier=fireworks, model='gemma' sentinel -> GEMMA_MODEL_ID) for the four categories the competence battery showed it is genuinely strong at: sentiment, entity_extraction, summarization, and _default/knowledge (official proxy: sentiment 2/2, entity 1/1, summarization 2/2, knowledge 3/3). These are NOT local-first, so Gemma actually serves them rather than catching rare local-tier escalations. math and logic go to kimi-k2p7-code (Gemma reproducibly fails multi-step % arithmetic; logic is historically flaky). code stays local-first -> kimi (cheap, Gemma not needed). REQUIRES a WARM deployment (Fireworks console: deployment min replicas = 1, disable scale-to-zero) or every Gemma call 503s into the kimi fallback and the entry becomes cosmetic again. Per-call kimi fallback (policy.py) still protects accuracy if Gemma has a transient failure.
